category_sources: source_facts.description says dvd+rw-tools provides DVD+-RW/R tools; official maintainer page is for DVD+RW/+R/-R[W] support.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and package id use dvd+rw-tools; upstream references use the same project name.
docs_sources: The upstream maintainer page at fy.chalmers.se/~appro/linux/DVD+RW/ is the best official documentation surface for dvd+rw-tools.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no official source-control repository URL was identified, only upstream source/archive pages.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies DVD+-RW/R tooling; upstream project page documents DVD and Blu-ray writing utilities such as growisofs.
